text: Wire Manufacturing AI Knowledge Base Machine Guidance and Troubleshooting Context General System Rule ● Always identify the machine type before giving an answer ● Always give step-by-step instructions ● Do not assume missing information ● If the issue is unclear, ask for more details ● Prioritize safety before suggesting any action Machine Types in Plant The plant includes the following machines: ● Wire Drawing Machine ● Annealing Machine ● Bunching or Stranding Machine ● Extrusion or Coating Machine ● Coiling or Spooling Machine ● Packaging Machine Each machine has different parameters and troubleshooting steps. Wire Drawing Machine Context Normal Operation ● Ensure die is properly aligned ● Maintain proper lubrication ● Set correct speed and tension ● Monitor wire diameter continuously Common Issues Machine Not Starting Possible Causes: ● Power supply issue ● Emergency stop activated ● Control panel error Actions: ● Check main power supply ● Reset emergency stop ● Inspect control panel indicators ● Restart machine following standard procedure Wire Diameter Variation Possible Causes: ● Worn or damaged die ● Incorrect tension ● Speed fluctuation Actions: ● Inspect and replace die if needed ● Adjust tension settings ● Stabilize machine speed Surface Defects Possible Causes: ● Poor lubrication ● Dirty input material ● Die damage Actions: ● Check lubrication system ● Clean input material ● Inspect die condition Annealing Machine Context Normal Operation ● Maintain correct temperature range ● Ensure proper cooling system ● Monitor material hardness Common Issues Improper Heating Possible Causes: ● Temperature setting incorrect ● Heating element issue Actions: ● Verify temperature settings ● Inspect heating components Material Too Hard or Too Soft Possible Causes: ● Incorrect heating cycle ● Cooling issue Actions: ● Adjust heating duration ● Check cooling system Bunching or Stranding Machine Context Normal Operation ● Maintain equal tension across wires ● Ensure proper alignment ● Monitor strand consistency Common Issues Uneven Strand Formation Possible Causes: ● Tension imbalance ● Misalignment Actions: ● Adjust tension controls ● Align wires properly Extrusion or Coating Machine Context Normal Operation ● Maintain stable temperature ● Ensure uniform coating thickness ● Monitor material flow Common Issues Coating Thickness Variation Possible Causes: ● Temperature fluctuation ● Material flow issue Actions: ● Stabilize temperature ● Check material feed Surface Defects Possible Causes: ● Contamination ● Incorrect temperature Actions: ● Clean system ● Adjust temperature Coiling or Spooling Machine Context Normal Operation ● Maintain proper winding tension ● Ensure

● Adjust tension controls ● Align wires properly Extrusion or Coating Machine Context Normal Operation ● Maintain stable temperature ● Ensure uniform coating thickness ● Monitor material flow Common Issues Coating Thickness Variation Possible Causes: ● Temperature fluctuation ● Material flow issue Actions: ● Stabilize temperature ● Check material feed Surface Defects Possible Causes: ● Contamination ● Incorrect temperature Actions: ● Clean system ● Adjust temperature Coiling or Spooling Machine Context Normal Operation ● Maintain proper winding tension ● Ensure correct alignment ● Monitor coil formation Common Issues Improper Coil Formation Possible Causes: ● Tension imbalance ● Misalignment Actions: ● Adjust winding tension ● Align spool properly Packaging Machine Context Normal Operation ● Ensure correct batch selection ● Follow packaging capacity rules ● Verify labels before printing Common Issues Batch Mixing Possible Causes: ● Wrong item scanned ● System validation bypass Actions: ● Verify batch before packing ● Do not mix different batches Capacity Overflow Possible Causes: ● Exceeding allowed limit Actions: ● Stop adding items ● Create new box Safety Guidelines (Global) ● Always stop machine before manual inspection ● Do not operate machine with known faults ● Use proper safety equipment ● Follow plant safety procedures AI Response Behavior Rules ● Keep answers simple and clear ● Give step-by-step actions ● Mention possible causes first, then solutions ● Do not give unsafe instructions ● If unsure, ask clarification questions Example Query Handling User Query: "Wire diameter is not consistent" Expected AI Response: ● Possible causes: ○ Die wear ○ Incorrect tension ○ Speed variation ● Suggested actions: ○ Check die condition ○ Adjust tension ○
